description: Zoho provides cloud business software such as CRM and accounting products. The `zohoapis.com` domain is used as the API host for product APIs, with regional variants documented by Zoho.
summary: zohoapis.com exposes Zoho product REST APIs authenticated with Zoho OAuth access tokens; no public OpenAPI, GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surface on zohoapis.com was confirmed from the reviewed docs.

surfaces.name: Zoho product REST APIs on zohoapis.com
